parts.text: Agent
I’d like to speak with a live customer service representative who can assist me today.
Can you connect me to a human agent for support?
I need to speak to a real person about my account immediately.
Please transfer me to a customer service specialist.
I want to talk with a consultant who can answer my questions.
Could you put me through to a live support agent right away?
I was just disconnected while speaking with a representative, and I need to continue the conversation.
I’d like to speak with someone who can help me resolve my issue.
Can you connect me with a customer care agent, not a virtual assistant?
I need to speak with a loyalty support representative.
Please transfer my call to a human advisor who can assist me.
I want to hold the line to speak with a customer support professional.
Could you connect me to an operator who can help me today?
I’d like to speak with a technical support agent in person, not a bot.
I need immediate assistance from a live representative.
Please put me through to a customer solution specialist.
I want to speak with someone who can handle my account questions.
Can you transfer me to a support agent who can help me resolve this issue?
I’d like to speak to a real person in customer service rather than using an automated system.
Could you connect me with an advisor who can answer all my questions?
I want to speak with a professional who can assist with my plan.
Please transfer me to a live representative who can help right now.
I need to speak to someone in customer relations immediately.
Can you connect me with a human specialist in support?
I want to talk to a representative who can handle my request without further delay.
